Fundamentals back it up: EPS +20% and revenue +17% YoY — the kind of numbers that attract institutional money. Trade setup: entry at $397.61, stop at $365.80 (–8%), target $477.13 (+20%). Risk/reward: 2.5:1.
key_strengths: confirmed Stage 2 uptrend (price $397.61 above MA50 $372 and MA200 $351)
RS line rising 11.1% in last 4 weeks — outperforming the market
EPS growing 20% year-over-year — institutional-grade earnings momentum
revenue up 17% YoY confirming earnings growth is real and sustained
what_to_watch: RSI at 61 — momentum healthy, watch for RSI to stay above 50 on any pullback
price is just 3.8% from 52-week high at $413.24 — that level is key resistance/breakout point
